description: Machine-readable source for Green Goods banned-vocabulary enforcement. The linter (scripts/design/check-vocab.sh, run via `bun run lint:vocab`) reads `linter_enforced.terms`. The `prompt_vocabulary_*` lists are documentation surfaces for AI design tools and coding agents — they are not runtime checks. Human-readable companion: docs/docs/reference/glossary-community.md § Banned Vocabulary.

linter_enforced.scope: user-facing strings in i18n JSON message values
linter_enforced.rationale: These terms signal growth-hacking / FOMO patterns that violate the regenerative design lens (Lens 1). See .claude/skills/design/regenerative.md § Be Growth-Agnostic and § Motivation Design Quick Reference for the full framework.

prompt_vocabulary_admin_banned.scope: AI-prompt vocabulary when generating admin-cockpit screens — NOT a runtime check, documentation only
prompt_vocabulary_admin_banned.rationale: Admin is a restrained operator cockpit. Hero moments are reserved for celebratory client PWA flows. Glass/liquid/frosted treatments are restricted to Navigation/FAB and sheet shells; the admin AppBar root stays transparent over the workspace canvas. Dense surfaces must be solid. Source: .claude/skills/design/prompt-contract.md § Never Use.

prompt_vocabulary_client_banned.scope: AI-prompt vocabulary when generating client PWA screens — NOT a runtime check, documentation only
prompt_vocabulary_client_banned.rationale: Client PWA is a garden journal, not an operator cockpit. Copy is warm and narrative, not terse task framing. Typography is Inter — Plus Jakarta Sans is admin-only. Source: .claude/skills/design/client-prompt-contract.md § Never Use.
